svg.title: TodoFlow — Fullstack AI Architecture with JWT Auth
svg.desc: Complete architecture diagram for TodoFlow including Better Auth, JWT tokens, middleware, FastAPI, MCP SDK, OpenAI ChatKit, Neon PostgreSQL and Docker deployment.
svg.text: Next.js • FastAPI • Better Auth • JWT • MCP • Docker • Neon PostgreSQL

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user register in TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('How does login work in TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('What can authenticated users access?')
sendPrompt('What does Better Auth do in TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('How does JWT work in TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('What does the middleware.ts file do?')
sendPrompt('What is the Next.js frontend built with?')
sendPrompt('How does task management work in the UI?')
sendPrompt('What analytics does TodoFlow show?')
sendPrompt('What does FastAPI handle in TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('What is SQLModel used for?')
sendPrompt('What does MCP SDK connect to?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI chatbot work in TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('How does AI help prioritize tasks?')
sendPrompt('What external tools does MCP agent connect?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Neon PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('Where are JWT tokens stored?')
sendPrompt('What analytics data is tracked?')
sendPrompt('How is TodoFlow deployed on Vercel?')
sendPrompt('How is Docker used in TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('What was Phase 1 of TodoFlow?')
sendPrompt('What was added in Phase 3?')
